name: the-light-shift
prompt: Wide shot from corner. Same room, but lighting shifted. Cool blue-white from screens dominant, amber warmth fading. Dark-haired man at table LEFT, brunette woman at window RIGHT. The atmosphere colder. Two figures in a room losing its warmth. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: her-quiet-response
prompt: Close-up. Brunette woman's face in shifting light — cool blue from window, fading amber from room. Voice quiet. Eyes holding something back. The composure costing her. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: Is that what you think I'm doing? Running?
